violation_description: General violation of any provision of the Act
notes: Residual clause for offences not specifically covered

violation_description: Use of vehicle without authority or permission
Driving without a valid driving licence
Exceeding speed limit - medium goods vehicle
Exceeding speed limit - heavy vehicle / bus / transport
Driving under influence of alcohol or drugs
notes: BAC limit: 30mg per 100ml blood. Non-compoundable in most states

violation_description: Racing or speed trial without permission

license_suspension: Registration cancelled, juvenile tried under JJ Act

violation_description: Driving without Pollution Under Control certificate
Driving on wrong side of road
Not giving way to emergency vehicles

imprisonment_first: Up to 6 months (injury) / Up to 10 years (death)

violation_description: Causing obstruction to free flow of traffic
Missing or improper number plate / fancy plate
Riding with more than one pillion rider (triple riding) on a two-wheeler
notes: Contravention of Section 128. DL disqualification for 3 months.
